description: A VTS Planner at the Port of Southampton needs to simulate the '0800 Rush Hour' to test a new ferry timetable. Create a Bridge Command scenario named 'f) Southampton Ferry Schedule' in /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/f) Southampton Ferry Schedule/ that implements the following schedule starting at 08:00:00 in the Solent environment with a static observer ownship: an Outbound Ferry (12 kts) starting at Berth (50.80N, 1.40W) heading South; an Inbound Ferry (15 kts) arriving at Berth (50.80N, 1.40W) at 08:20 from the South; a Crossing Hovercraft (30 kts) crossing the channel intersection (50.75N, 1.40W) at 08:10 from the West; and an Escort Tug (10 kts) starting 1.0 nautical mile behind the Outbound Ferry. Calculate the required starting positions for the vessels and generate the necessary environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini files. (Math Hint: 1 degree of Latitude = 60 nm. At this latitude, 1 degree of Longitude approx 38 nm).
